name: Kombai
description: Kombai — AI-powered Figma-to-code tool that converts UI designs into production-ready React components.

seo.title: Kombai — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Kombai: Kombai — AI-powered Figma-to-code tool that converts UI designs into production-ready React components.

when_to_use: Converting a Figma design to production React components
Design-to-code handoff eliminating manual CSS interpretation
Generating component scaffolding from UI design files
Accelerating frontend development from Figma prototypes
AI-assisted UI code generation for design system components

review.verdict: Best-in-class Figma-to-React today — still an accelerator, not a replacement for frontend engineers.
review.best_for: React teams looking to accelerate first-pass component implementation from Figma
review.not_for: Non-React stacks or teams expecting fully production-ready code without review
